message.content:
# UI Design Detailed Description

## 1. Overall Layout and Structure
The UI consists of a mobile phone mockup centered on a black background. The phone displays a personal portfolio/developer profile page with a dark gradient background. Below the phone, there's a notification bar with performance optimization information and a cookie consent banner at the bottom of the screen.

## 2. Text Content
- "Bruno Pal" (top of phone screen, profile name)
- "HELLO, MY NAME IS BRUNO" (green text)
- "And I build websites." (green text)
- "Full Stack MERN Developer |" (white text)
- "MongoDB - Express - React -" (white text)
- "Node.js | Creating efficient," (white text)
- "scalable web applications" (white text)
- "focused on user experience." (white text)
- "Projects" (white text, section header)
- "Improve performance by enabling hardware acceleration" (white text in notification bar)
- "Learn more" (white text in notification bar)
- "This website uses cookies, pixel tags, and local storage for performance, personalization, and marketing purposes. Our use of some cookies may be considered a sale, sharing for behavioral advertising, or targeted advertising. For more, see our privacy policy. California Residents can learn how personal information is collected, including how it is used, whether it is "sold" or "shared", and how long it is retained." (small white text in cookie banner)
- "Opt out" (white text in cookie banner)
- "privacy policy" (blue text in cookie banner)

## 3. Colors Used
- Background: Solid black (#000000)
- Phone screen background: Dark gradient (black to dark purple/navy)
- Text: 
  - Green for name and tagline ("HELLO, MY NAME IS BRUNO" and "And I build websites.")
  - White for all other text content
- Buttons/interactive elements: None visible in the main interface
- Notification bar: Dark gray background with white text
- Cookie banner: Dark gray background with white text

## 4. Component Types
- Mobile phone mockup (iPhone-style)
- Profile header with name
- Heading section with name and tagline
- Skills section with bullet points
- Projects section header
- Notification bar (performance optimization)
- Cookie consent banner
- Close buttons (X icons) for both notification bars

## 5. Typography Styles
- Profile name: Sans-serif, medium weight, white color
- Main heading: Sans-serif, bold weight, green color
- Subheading: Sans-serif, regular weight, green color
- Body text: Sans-serif, regular weight, white color
- Section headers: Sans-serif, regular weight, white color
- Notification text: Sans-serif, regular weight, white color
- Cookie banner text: Sans-serif, small regular weight, white color
- Link text: Sans-serif, regular weight, blue color

## 6. Spacing and Alignment
- The phone mockup is centered both horizontally and vertically on the black background
- Text content on the phone screen is left-aligned
- The notification bar is centered horizontally below the phone
- The cookie banner spans the full width of the screen at the bottom
- All text has consistent padding and margin within the phone screen
- The "Projects" section appears to have additional spacing below it (likely for project cards that aren't visible in this view)

## 7. Icons or Images
- Profile picture icon (small circular image) next to the name "Bruno Pal" at the top of the phone screen
- "X" close icons in both the notification bar and cookie banner
- The phone mockup has a realistic design with screen bezel and home button

## 8. Navigation Elements
- No visible navigation elements in the main interface
- The interface appears to be a single-page view of a portfolio/profile

## 9. App Type/Purpose
This appears to be a personal portfolio or developer profile page, likely for a web developer specializing in the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js). The purpose is to showcase the developer's skills and projects to potential clients or employers. The design is minimal and professional, focusing on the developer's technical expertise and user experience focus.

The interface suggests this could be part of a portfolio website or a personal branding page designed to highlight the developer's capabilities and attract professional opportunities.
